name: tts
description: Dual-backend text-to-speech: Kokoro ONNX (local) + OpenAI tts-1 (cloud)

backends.name: kokoro
backends.description: Kokoro ONNX -- local inference, free, ~330MB models
backends.detection: model files present + kokoro_onnx import + ffmpeg + dynamic probe

backends.name: openai-tts
backends.description: OpenAI tts-1 -- cloud fallback, native OGG/Opus output

workflows.name: basic-synthesis
workflows.description: Synthesize text to OGG/Opus (auto-selects best backend)

workflows.name: telegram-voice-message
workflows.description: Produce + deliver a Telegram voice message via the bridge relay
steps: Bridge relay sends with voice_note=True; arrives as a voice bubble
